short_summary: Ukraine advances near Black Sea region
rationale: Ukraine's intensified strikes on Russian logistics are a qualitative development directly relevant to Romania's Black Sea security environment.

top_events.title: Ukraine doubles attacks on Russian logistics, reclaims territory
top_events.summary: Ukraine's stepped-up logistics strikes represent a meaningful shift in war dynamics, directly relevant to Romania as a Black Sea NATO neighbor monitoring conflict trajectory.

top_events.title: Iran deal stalemate continues with contradictory signals
top_events.summary: Ongoing Iran deal uncertainty keeps modest pressure on global energy markets, with indirect effect on Romanian energy costs and EU economic stability.

top_events.title: Ebola spreads into new areas of DR Congo
top_events.summary: Geographic spread of Ebola in DRC is a distant concern for Romania; no direct regional threat but EU health monitoring may be triggered.
